patches.note: Incremental patch for a PAK that already contains the earlier real-P2 profile and PLAY-switch fix: move the dispatch target by the additional 59-byte native callback insertion.
Call native UpdateCharacterTypes(currentKong, selected P2 Kong) before the existing initLevelTransition call. local_3 already contains the selected P2 Kong string.
Correct the PLAY lookupswitch case after the additional 59-byte insertion: offset changes from -213 to -272.
